falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 15% above the previous 6-month high within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the unknown verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 300% of the 30-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would suggest strong market participation, refuting the HOLD phase and indicating a potential blowoff or breakout.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price fails to reach 85% of the 2022 May Luna pattern's subsequent price increase within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the pattern similarity claim, as the historical precedent would not align with current market behavior.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
